CES 2026 theme: AI-defined mobility (AI-DV). TOP AGENTS: (1) openpilot (commaai/openpilot, MIT, ~11.1k stars) — OS for robotics/ADAS, ACC+ALC on 325+ cars, real ML trained on millions of miles.
